title: Import PDF
description: Import a PDF as a book, chunked by page range

upload.intro: Import a PDF as a book — including lore/technical reference PDFs, not just novels. Long PDFs are split into chapters by page range (configured on the next step).

configure.pagesPerChunkHint: Each group of this many pages becomes one chapter — no 'Chapter N' heading detection is used for PDF imports, so this works even for reference/technical books with no chapter markers.
configure.willCreate_one: This will create {{count}} chapter from {{pages}} page.
configure.willCreate_other: This will create {{count}} chapters from {{pages}} pages.
configure.highChapterWarning: That's a lot of chapters — consider a larger 'pages per chunk' value if this wasn't intentional. The import will still run.
configure.captionImagesHint: Extracts charts/images and captions them via a vision model so glossary/KG extraction can see chart content. Uses LLM credits per image.
configure.visionModelHint: Pick a model that actually supports image input — not every chat model does.

confirm.needModel: Choose a vision model before starting — captioning is enabled but no model is selected.
confirm.backgroundNote: This runs in the background — you can close this dialog and check progress from the Jobs panel at any time.

progress.longNote: This can take a while for a long PDF — especially with AI captioning enabled. Dismiss the dialog any time; the import keeps running and is tracked in the Jobs panel.
progress.backgroundToast: Import continues in the background — check the Jobs panel for progress.
